query:
UPDATE userEmailSendLog
SET status = 'failed',
    error = 'STALE: pending slot never finalised — cleared by admin 2026-05-15'
WHERE userId = 2340043
  AND digestType = 'thursday'
  AND sentDate = '2026-05-14'
  AND status = 'pending';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute 
UPDATE userEmailSendLog
SET status = 'failed',
    error = 'STALE: pending slot never finalised — cleared by admin 2026-05-15'
WHERE userId = 2340043
  AND digestType = 'thursday'
  AND sentDate = '2026-05-14'
  AND status = 'pending';
